content:
请用简洁的一句中文总结以下 git 改动的内容，直接输出 commit message，不要加引号、不要解释、不要任何前缀：

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7e59600
--- /dev/null
+++ b/README.md
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+# README
diff --git a/math.js b/math.js
index 73ec83b..4183af5 100644
--- a/math.js
+++ b/math.js
@@ -1 +1,2 @@
 function add(a, b) { return a + b; }
+function subtract(a, b) { return a - b; }

message.content:
请用简洁的一句中文总结以下 git 改动的内容，直接输出 commit message，不要加引号、不要解释、不要任何前缀：

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7e59600
--- /dev/null
+++ b/README.md
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+# README
diff --git a/math.js b/math.js
index 73ec83b..4183af5 100644
--- a/math.js
+++ b/math.js
@@ -1 +1,2 @@
 function add(a, b) { return a + b; }
+function subtract(a, b) { return a - b; }

content.thinking:
The user wants a concise one-line Chinese commit message summarizing the git diff.

The diff shows:
1. New README.md file with just "# README"
2. math.js has a new subtract function added

So the commit message should summarize both changes.

content.text: 新增 README 文件，math.js 添加减法函数
